snapshot_metadata.description: Capability snapshot of Bee host surfaces (Codex 0.144.4 + Claude Code profile). Documents known/observed tool and collaboration API surfaces. Nested event interception and fresh-task discovery (L6/L7 per SPEC D-05) are deferred and marked pending_live_probe.

functions.exec.description: Outer function execution interface in Codex runtime

tools.exec_command.description: Nested tool for executing shell commands within Codex task
tools.exec_command.note: SPEC E-12 documents existence; mechanical interception requires L6/L7 fresh-task probe

tools.apply_patch.description: Nested tool for applying file patches within Codex task
tools.apply_patch.note: SPEC E-12 documents existence; guard coverage requires L6/L7 live interception proof

spawn_agent.description: Spawn isolated worker or reviewer agent in separate Codex task

task_name.description: Stable canonical name for spawned task

message.description: Prompt to agent; MUST have [bee-tier: generation|extraction|review|ceiling] marker anchored at message start

fork_turns.description: Isolation policy; 'none' means spawned task has no access to parent history beyond passed message

followup_task.description: Send follow-up message to existing agent/task for continuation

target.description: Agent ID or canonical task name to continue

message.description: Continuation prompt with tier marker if needed

model_selector.description: Codex collaboration schema does not expose model selection parameter

nested_event_interception_capability.description: Capability to intercept and validate nested tool calls (exec_command, apply_patch) at guard points
nested_event_interception_capability.note: SPEC D-05: nested write/read/spawn surfaces require fresh Codex task + trusted session mechanical proof before mechanical support can be claimed. Currently documented surface without interception proof.

claude.version: Claude Code harness (version per AGENTS.md onboarding)

tools.name: Edit
tools.description: Modify file in place with exact replacement

tools.name: Write
tools.description: Create or overwrite file with full content

tools.name: MultiEdit
tools.description: Perform multiple file mutations in sequence

tools.name: Bash
tools.description: Execute shell commands in session context

tools.name: Read
tools.description: Read file content with line numbers

tools.name: Grep
tools.description: Search for text pattern in files

tools.name: Agent
tools.description: Spawn new agent with task assignment

fresh_task_discovery.description: Codex capability to discover project-local Bee skills after task startup
fresh_task_discovery.expected_behavior: Fresh Codex task should discover project .agents/skills and list Bee skill roots with correct version matching runtime

guard_coverage_summary.provenance_explanation: documented = behavior described in spec/manifest; live_probed = observed in current runtime; pending_live_probe = documented but requires L6/L7 fresh-task/trusted-session proof before claiming mechanical support
guard_coverage_summary.nested_tool_interception: pending_live_probe - SPEC D-05 requires fresh Codex task + trusted session deny/allow proof
guard_coverage_summary.tier_marker_routing: documented via SPEC §9.1; live enforcement requires L6/L7 probe
